decks.notes: The primary focus of the Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly deploy creatures and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. By utilizing mana accelerators like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo, along with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Mossborn Hydra, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on. Additionally, cards like Earthbender Ascension and Erode help to remove opposing threats, while cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Surrak, Elusive Hunter provide additional support and flexibility in combat. The deck also includes a variety of lands to ensure consistent mana production and efficient creature deployment.

The deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures while utilizing ramp and combat tricks to maintain board control. With a solid mix of early game accelerants like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo, along with powerful finishers like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent from the start and close out the game quickly. The inclusion of cards like Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage help ensure consistency in mana production while also providing some flexibility in card draws and land drops.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and cheap, efficient spells. The deck focuses on tempo and card advantage, using cards like Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Stormchaser's Talent to set up explosive plays. Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off provide early threats, while Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics offer removal and disruption. The deck also utilizes bounce spells like Get Out and Bounce Off to keep the opponent off balance. Roaring Furnace / Steaming Sauna can provide additional reach and finish off the opponent quickly.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of creatures and spells to create a fast-paced aggressive strategy, aiming to quickly overwhelm opponents with damage. Key cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider provide consistent damage, while spells like Burst Lightning and Ill-Timed Explosion can finish off opponents or clear the way for attackers. The deck also includes some control elements with cards like Deceit and Roaming Throne to disrupt opponents' strategies. The mana base is designed to support the deck's color requirements and ensure smooth gameplay.

The main concept of the deck is to control the game by using a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells to outvalue the opponent. The deck includes a variety of instant-speed removal spells and board wipes to deal with threats efficiently while using card draw effects like Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation to maintain card advantage. The deck also includes a few win conditions like Swallowed by Leviathan and Lightning Helix to close out the game once the opponent's resources have been depleted. The mana base is designed to support the deck's three-color requirements effectively.

The main concept of the deck is to overwhelm your opponent with quick and efficient creatures and spells. The deck focuses on casting low-costed spells, drawing cards, and bouncing opposing threats back to their hand. By using cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, you can apply pressure early in the game while controlling the board with cards like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics. The deck aims to maintain tempo and apply consistent pressure to win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively control the board with cheap spells and creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off. The deck focuses on tempo and disruption with cards like Opt, Burst Lightning, and Boomerang Basics to slow down opponents and maintain board advantage. The inclusion of cards like Flow State and Stormchaser's Talent emphasize the aggressive playstyle, while cards like Impractical Joke and Stock Up provide additional utility. The mana base allows for consistent access to all necessary colors for spells, ensuring the deck can operate smoothly throughout the game.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the combination of cards that allow for powerful creature reanimation to overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man to cheat creatures into play, along with support cards like Duress and Bitter Triumph to disrupt the opponent's plans, this deck aims to quickly establish board presence and control the game. With a mix of removal spells and card draw, the deck seeks to efficiently bring back powerful threats like Doomsday Excruciator and Emeritus of Ideation to dominate the battlefield.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, combining the evasive abilities of Spyglass Siren and Deep-Cavern Bat with the control elements of Floodpits Drowner and Requiting Hex. Tishana's Tidebinder and Cecil, Dark Knight provide additional support and card draw, while the deck also includes removal options like Shoot the Sheriff and Bitter Triumph. By utilizing a mix of tempo and disruption, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with aggressive plays and quick spells. The deck revolves around utilizing low-cost creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to chip away at your opponent's life total, while also using efficient burn spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board. The deck also includes card draw and mana fixing to ensure consistency in your plays. The inclusion of Stormchaser's Talent and Impractical Joke adds to the aggression of the deck, aiming to close out games quickly.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and powerful spells. By combining the abilities of cards like Flamebraider and Ashling, Rekindled with the direct damage spells like Burst Lightning and Sear, you aim to swiftly reduce your opponent's life total to zero. The deck also includes cards like Deceit and Quantum Riddler to disrupt your opponent's game plan, giving you the upper hand in the match. Overall, the strategy of this Temur Aggro deck is to apply constant pressure and finish the game quickly.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. By utilizing low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, the deck aims to quickly build a board presence and apply pressure early on. Cards like Ouroboroid and Brightglass Gearhulk provide additional power and resilience to the creatures. The deck also includes support cards like Seam Rip and Meltstrider's Resolve to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect its own creatures. Overall, the goal is to establish dominance on the battlefield and swiftly defeat the opponent.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of creatures. By utilizing powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, along with pump spells like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension, the goal is to deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. The deck also includes some disruptive elements like Erode and Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam to handle opposing threats. With efficient mana ramp from Llanowar Elves and potential card advantage from cards like Keen-Eyed Curator, this deck aims to close out games swiftly.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Oildeep Gearhulk, and then bring them back onto the battlefield using cards like Deceit and Requiting Hex. By utilizing the reanimation strategy combined with various control elements such as Duress and Bitter Triumph, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and spells. The mana base is designed to provide the needed colors while also offering some utility lands like Gloomlake Verge and Cavern of Souls to enhance the deck's overall performance.
